title: By Faith We Rise

sections.label: Intro
lines: The wind calls out across the ages
Whispers written in the dust
Footsteps tracing sacred pages
Echoing in love and trust

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Noah built while skies were clear
Mocked by those who stood so near
Still, the waters rose in time
By faith, he walked, by faith, we climb

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Abraham, a stranger wandering
Left his home for distant land
Not yet knowing, still responding
Held by promise, held by hand

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Every fire, every storm
Still, the promise keeps us warm

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Faith is the substance of hope
The proof of things we’ve yet to see
Carried by the hands of our Creator
Through the trials, we believe

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Moses stood before the waters
Staff in hand, a heart of trust
Though the sea was dark and raging
Still, the waves would part for us

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Walls fell down as trumpets sounded
Voices lifted, fearless cries
Marching strong in holy silence
By faith, they lived, by faith, we rise

sections.label: Bridge
lines: They walked through fire, stood unshaken
Roared with courage, never breaking
Not of this world, but of the Light
By faith, they lived, by faith, we rise

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Faith is the substance of hope
The proof of things we’ve yet to see
Carried by the hands of our Creator
Through the trials, we believe

sections.label: Outro
lines: Through the trials, we believe...
Through the trials, we believe...
By faith, we rise...
By faith, we rise...

styleNote: Soft Guitar Arpeggios · Rising Intensity · Full Band Explosion
